title: Better Stone Recipe
description: Make more stones available for stone tools, such as granite, diorite, andesite, etc.!
body:
# Better Stone Recipe

Make more stones available for stone tools, such as granite, diorite, andesite, etc.!

![sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c968b27bd8c6b1790f12f32d1c8381cde2ba8c.png)
